name: Tabouli Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Place yeast, 3 cups Flour (bread), 2 tablespoons Sugar, 1/2 tablespoon Salt, 1 Egg, and 1 tablespoon Olive Oil in breadmaker.
2. Add boiling water to tabouli ingredients and mix well until cool to lukewarm. Use less water if weather is hot and humid.
3. Bring remaining ingredients to room temperature and add them to the breadmaker in order. Pour the lukewarm tabouli mixture into the breadmaker.
4. Set baking control at 11 o'clock, select "white bread," and press Start.
5. Add olives and apricots at beep (88 minutes into cycle).
